Interface IAdjustXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an adjustment (rubber sheeting) transform.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("8A26D9EF-F002-4124-8939-9CA7A25F484C")]
public interface IAdjustXform : IGeodataXform

NaturalNeighbor

Indicates if natural neighbor interpolation should be used.

bool
